title: ModelWinCenterY Property
description: Sets and returns the Y coordinate value on the center of the model window.
notes:
Sets and returns the Y coordinate value on the center of the model window. Setting values are automatically updated when the model window is removed or resized.

See Also: ModelWinCenterY Property

ModelWinCenterX Property

Vision Objects: ModelWinCenterY Property

Correlation

Geometric

Applies To
